get.description: Liveness probe for the HR API. Requires developer JWT, X-Fluide-Api-Key, and X-Fluide-Client-Id — use Authorize in the playground.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -sS -X GET "$FLUIDE_BASE_URL/api/v1/hr/health" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $FLUIDE_ACCESS_TOKEN" \
  -H "X-Fluide-Api-Key: $FLUIDE_API_KEY" \
  -H "X-Fluide-Client-Id: fluide-developer"

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os
import requests

base_url = os.environ["FLUIDE_BASE_URL"]
headers = {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['FLUIDE_ACCESS_TOKEN']}",
        "X-Fluide-Api-Key": os.environ["FLUIDE_API_KEY"],
        "X-Fluide-Client-Id": "fluide-developer",
}

response = requests.get(
    f"{base_url}/api/v1/hr/health",
    headers=headers,
    timeout=30,
)
response.raise_for_status()
print(response.json())

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php
$baseUrl = getenv("FLUIDE_BASE_URL");
$ch = curl_init($baseUrl . "/api/v1/hr/health");
curl_setopt_array($ch, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Authorization: Bearer ' . getenv('FLUIDE_ACCESS_TOKEN'),
        'X-Fluide-Api-Key: ' . getenv('FLUIDE_API_KEY'),
        'X-Fluide-Client-Id: fluide-developer',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($ch);
if ($response === false) throw new RuntimeException(curl_error($ch));
$status = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
if ($status >= 400) throw new RuntimeException("HTTP $status: $response");
echo $response;

get.description: List clock events in a date range. Optional IANA `timeZone` interprets `from`/`to` as local calendar days. Without `hr:attendance:write`, scope is self-only (`hr:attendance:self:write` only), direct reports (`hr:attendance:read`), or full reporting subtree (`hr:attendance:read` + `hr:attendance:team:read`).

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: IANA time zone (e.g. Africa/Douala). Interprets from/to as local calendar days.

parameters.name: hrEmployeeId
parameters.description: Filter by HR employee UUID (requires hr:attendance:write for unrestricted scope).

200.description: Clock events in the requested date range

info.title: Fluide HR API
info.description: Employee records, contracts, leave, performance, OKRs, and HR insights. HR is the canonical employee source consumed by payroll and other suite services. In the API playground, click Authorize and provide Bearer JWT, X-Fluide-Api-Key, and X-Fluide-Client-Id (fluide-developer).

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Liveness and readiness probes. Returns dependency status (database, Redis, etc.) for orchestrators and uptime monitors.

tags.name: Prometheus
tags.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint in text exposition format. Configure your metrics collector to poll this path on each service.

tags.name: HR Employees
tags.description: Create and manage employee records tied to your organization.

bearer.description: Access token JWT. Use as Authorization: Bearer <token>. In the API playground, paste the JWT only.

fluideApiKey.name: X-Fluide-Api-Key
fluideApiKey.description: Developer API key (fl_dev_...). Required on every API call with a machine access token.

fluideClientId.name: X-Fluide-Client-Id
fluideClientId.description: First-party client audience. Must match the fluide_client_id claim on the JWT. Use fluide-developer for Connect.

fluideApiSecret.name: X-Fluide-Api-Secret
fluideApiSecret.description: API secret used only during token exchange. Never send on product routes.

message.description: Human-readable outcome message (localized when i18n is configured)

data.description: Response payload when success is true

message.description: Human-readable error message (localized when i18n is configured)

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code for client handling and support

errors.description: Field-level validation errors keyed by property name

from: from must be a valid date

sendStaffSetupEmail.description: Send staff-first-access email when outbound mail is configured

role.description: Optional org role hint for SEND_INVITE (stored under profileExtensions.bulkImport).

employeeCode.description: Leave blank to auto-generate on commit

payoutWalletUserId.description: UUID of user wallet for WALLET_TRANSFER

effectiveFrom.description: Effective date of the new role / placement (YYYY-MM-DD)

newDepartmentId.description: When set, updates employee department master FK

newDesignation.description: When set, updates employee designation / job title

done.description: Legacy flag; kept in sync with `status` (DONE/SKIPPED => true).

completedByUserId.description: Defaults to the authenticated user when transitioning to a terminal status.

reportingManagerUserId.description: FluideAuth user id of the reporting manager; send null to remove.

attachmentUrls.description: Public URLs or storage keys for supporting documents

diagnosisTag.description: Sick/medical category label for HR reporting

storageUrl.description: Download or view URL (or storage key resolved by gateway)

acknowledgedConsequences.description: Must be true: confirms the actor is authorized to stop onboarding and understands separation workflow may follow.

secondApproverUserId.description: Optional second approver (HRBP / legal designee) when organizational policy requires two-person control.

terminationDate.description: Effective separation date (UTC calendar date). Defaults to today when completing offboarding.

clientRequestId.description: Idempotency token (or send `Idempotency-Key` header). When set, duplicate submits return the same clock row.

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 instant; defaults to server now

latitude.description: Client-reported latitude (geofence adapters may use later)

geofenceId.description: Logical geofence / site id from your mobile app

deviceId.description: Client device identifier for attestation / audit

biometricVendor.description: Biometric stack vendor label (e.g. passkey provider)

skipPairValidation.description: If true and caller holds hr:attendance:write, skips IN/OUT alternation validation (HR correction)

code.description: Stable site code referenced by mobile clients (geofenceId)
